summary: A website project featuring 5 partner logos (Smartway Wellness, AquaLab, Smart Laboratories, Cipla, Laborate Pharmaceuticals India Ltd.) displayed using a provided combined image. The logos section should use a light/white background (not black) and be compact/space-efficient.
architectural_notes: Use a light/white background for the logos section — explicitly no black/dark background
Display partner logos using a single combined image containing all 5 logos in a compact layout
imageRequirements:
## Edit Images
- Replace the dark/black background with a clean white or light neutral background, keeping all five logos (Smartway Wellness, AquaLab, Smart Laboratories, Cipla, Laborate Pharmaceuticals India Ltd.) fully visible and well-spaced (file_000000009d34720693b8df539e35b6e1.png > partner-logos-light.dim_1320x860.png)

existing_features.title: Generate a version of the uploaded logos image (containing Smartway Wellness, AquaLab, Smart Laboratories, Cipla, and Laborate Pharmaceuticals India Ltd.) with a clean white or light neutral background instead of the dark/black background, preserving all logos at full visibility.

In the pharmaceutical partners section of App.tsx, replace any existing individual logo elements or dark-background image with the new light-background combined logos image saved as a static asset in frontend/public/assets/generated/. Display it in a compact, space-efficient layout with a light/white section background.
